description: Use this API to to set the option progress message verbose value. This value is used to show or not show some repetitive progress messages when reading sequence data file. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0 and 35.2.0. ierr = set_progress_verbose(ival)

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; -1 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
